sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (U_ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, U_NAME VARCHAR(255), U_EMAIL VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, U_DOB DATE);
INSERT INTO users (U_ID, U_NAME, U_EMAIL, U_DOB) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 'john@example.com', '1990-01-01');
INSERT INTO users (U_ID, U_NAME, U_EMAIL, U_DOB) VALUES (2, 'Jane Smith', 'jane@example.com', NULL);
SELECT U_ID, U_NAME, bif:crc64(CONCAT(U_NAME, COALESCE(U_EMAIL, 'unknown'))) AS UserHash FROM users ORDER BY UserHash;
CREATE TABLE transactions (T_ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, U_ID INTEGER, T_AMOUNT DECIMAL(10, 2), T_TIMESTAMP TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (U_ID) REFERENCES users(U_ID));
INSERT INTO transactions (T_ID, U_ID, T_AMOUNT) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50), (2, 1, NULL), (3, 2, 200.75);
SELECT U.U_ID, U.U_NAME, SUM(T.T_AMOUNT) AS TotalAmount FROM users U LEFT JOIN transactions T ON U.U_ID = T.U_ID GROUP BY U.U_ID, U.U_NAME HAVING TotalAmount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT bif:crc64(CAST(U_ID AS VARCHAR)) AS UserIDHash, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY UserIDHash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
